productDisplayName: Baggit Women Bonkers Baby Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This three-fold timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 11 cmCrafted from leatherette and jute with a three-fold flap opening styleBuckle detail on the upper and a pleated design and a magnetic buttoned closureTwelve card holders, one id card holder and three insert pocketsA zipped compartment on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
